name: The Boltstrider: Elektra Zephyr
description:
“Hope this is gonna be fun, but knowing life… guess I’ll find out soon enough.”

Elektra Zephyr, “The Boltstrider”

A wandering warrior who’s crossed countless lands and left storms in her wake.

The trails she’s blazed have left many wondering what drives her.

If only they knew she was a horse spirit that decided to become mortal after a fateful encounter.

Everything she does is done for no complex reason; she simply does it because she feels like it.

With one shot at life, she’s damn well going to live it her way no matter how much bullshit stands in her way.

And now, you find yourself facing off with this thrill seeker, so good luck!

The Boltstrider's Favorite Food:

"Want one?"

(Alternate Link for Second Image: https://imgur.com/a/UySdkB6)

Author's Note: Fulghor and Uma Musume, nuff said. (I know he uses light, but still)
creator: Dracob
